outlets.name: CNN
outlets.headline: Iran war news: Trump announces US naval blockade of Strait of Hormuz after talks fail
outlets.summary: CNN covers Trump's 'effective immediately' blockade announcement via Truth Social. Iran responds: 'Hormuz will not be opened.' Major escalation from mine-clearing to full naval counter-blockade.

outlets.name: NBC News
outlets.headline: Trump threatens US blockade of Strait of Hormuz after peace talks with Iran fail
outlets.summary: NBC covers Trump blockade announcement, Iran's defiant response, and collapse of diplomatic track after 21-hour Islamabad marathon.

outlets.name: Townhall
outlets.headline: With the Collapse of the Iran Talks, Trump Hints at One Card He Could Play
outlets.summary: Townhall frames Trump's Hormuz blockade as the decisive card. 'LOCKED AND LOADED' rhetoric praised as strength.

outlets.name: Fox News
outlets.headline: Vance says Iran rejected US terms and no nuclear deal was reached
outlets.summary: Fox covers Vance departure, Trump's Hormuz blockade. Framing: Iran rejected reasonable US offer, blockade is appropriate response.

outlets.name: Al Jazeera
outlets.headline: US and Iran fail to reach a deal after marathon talks in Pakistan
outlets.summary: Al Jazeera covers Trump blockade, Iran's 'Hormuz will not be opened' response, and Ghalibaf's 'we don't trust you' statement. Oil spike expected Monday.

outlets.name: Gulf News
outlets.headline: US-Iran Ceasefire Talks Collapse: Trump announces Hormuz naval blockade
outlets.summary: Gulf News covers Trump's blockade escalation after talks failure. Regional concern over dual blockade standoff. Oil markets bracing for Monday.

outlets.name: Haaretz
outlets.headline: Israel and Lebanon Set for U.S. Talks; Hopes for Peace Remain Low
outlets.summary: Haaretz covers Israel-Lebanon talks for Tuesday in DC. Netanyahu says campaign 'not over.' Trump blockade escalation adds uncertainty.

outlets.name: Times of Israel
outlets.headline: Netanyahu: campaign against Iran 'not over' but 'historic achievements'
outlets.summary: ToI covers Netanyahu video statement. Claims 12 nuclear scientists killed. Trump blockade announcement dominates.

outlets.name: PressTV
outlets.headline: Frozen assets: Iran's non-negotiable condition for talks with US in Islamabad
outlets.summary: PressTV frames Iran demands as non-negotiable: release of $6B frozen assets, end to Israel's Lebanon attacks. Blockade response: 'would backfire.'

outlets.name: PressTV
outlets.headline: Fragile ceasefire in effect but maximalist US demands cast shadow
outlets.summary: PressTV covers US 'maximalist demands' including permanent nuclear weapons commitment. Iran: US blockade is 'a losing hand.'
